<?php namespace Spatie\Html\Elements\Attributes; /** * @method static autofocusIf(bool $condition, bool $autofocus) * @method static autofocusIfNotNull(bool $condition, bool $autofocus) * @method static autofocusUnless(bool $condition, bool $autofocus) */ trait Autofocus { /** * @param bool $autofocus * * @return static */ public function autofocus($autofocus = true) { return $autofocus ? $this->attribute('autofocus') : $this->forgetAttribute('autofocus'); } }
